name: Cinnamon Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the flour, brown sugar, cinnamon, shortening, baking powder, and salt.
2. Add 1 beaten egg to the mixture with 1 cup of milk. Mix until combined.
3. Roll out the dough and spread it with melted margarine, mixed with cinnamon, brown sugar, and raisins.
4. Slice into 1/4-inch thick pieces.
5. Bake for 15 minutes.
